messages.text: What is the score?
Francia lidera actualmente a Marruecos 1-0 en el minuto 43 en el SoFi Stadium.
Where is the nearest restroom from Gate C?
🚻 Restrooms at MetLife Stadium are fully accessible. Family toilets are in Section 104, 117, 128, and 143. C-Gate toilets are right adjacent to Section 112 and 114.
Is Section 112 restroom crowded?
🚻 Restroom (Sec 112) has an 18-minute wait due to high crowd density. I recommend taking a short walk to Restroom (Sec 104) where the wait is only 2 minutes!
I lost my child Billy in Section 112
🚨 COMPANION LOCATED: Billy has been found by stadium stewards and is currently safe at the Guest Services Booth (Section 124). Please head there immediately to reunite.
Who scored for France?
Argentina is leading Australia 2-1 in the 67th minute here at MetLife Stadium.

🚻 Restrooms at MetLife Stadium are fully accessible. Family toilets are in Section 104, 117, 128, and 143. C-Gate toilets are right adjacent to Section 112 and 114.

🍕 Nonnas Pizza (Sec 114) is currently congested with a 20-minute wait. I highly recommend Nonnas Pizza (Sec 324) which is clear with only a 4-minute wait!
